info.title: Catalog API V2
info.description:
# Introduction
Catalog API integration let partners to access Kroger's catalog data via available product endpoints. The catalog can be customized for the partners based on their needs and requirements.

tags.name: Catalog V2
tags.description:
The Catalog V2 API allows you to access Kroger's catalog data. The catalog can be customized for clients based on their needs and requirements.

### Pagination Product search supports pagination with a default value of 20 results per page. Using the following parameters in the request, you can configure the size and offset of the response:

  • page.size - Sets a number of products to be listed in the response.
  • page.offset - Sets a number of products to skip in the response.




    • ### API Operations
    Name Method Description
    Catalog Search GET Returns a list of products and their core information.
    Catalog Inventory GET Returns inventory details for one or more products.
    Deleted Items GET Returns a list of disabled products within a specified time range.

get.description: Search the product catalog based upon specified criteria.

parameters.name: filter.upc.in
parameters.description:
Exact match to product identifier, typically UPC, or GTIN.

Duplicate UPCs if present in the request parameter are ignored.

Max allowed non-duplicate UPCs per request: 50

parameters.name: filter.locations.id.eq
parameters.description:
Exact match to the 8-character locationId for the store or distribution center.

(filter.storeId.eq in the original Catalog Search endpoint.)

parameters.name: filter.locations.fulfillment.eq
parameters.description:
Exact match to product fulfillment option.

Must be one of: DELIVERY, SHIP, PICKUP, or INSTORE.

(filter.modality.eq in the original Catalog Search endpoint.)

parameters.name: filter.postalCode.eq
parameters.description:
Exact match to postal code or ZIP code. (When filter.modality is set to DELIVERY for Ocado stores.)

**This is a required field to request Ocado DELIVERY store products.**

**Note:** For US addresses, one can use either the 5-digit or 9-digit ZIP+4.

parameters.name: filter.updatedAt.range
parameters.description:
The updated date range provided as a comma separated set with the start date and end date in that order. 

Products updated within this range (inclusive) will be returned.

parameters.name: option.missingPrices
parameters.description:
Controls whether items without pricing information are included in the response.

- If omitted or set to `false`, only items with pricing information available will be returned.
- If set to `true`, all items will be included. Items without pricing details will also appear in the API response.

**Note:** Use this parameter when you want to include UPCs that don't have any associated pricing data.

x-code-samples.source:
package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"io/ioutil"
	"net/http"
)

func main() {
	url := "https://api.kroger.com/catalog/v2/products?filter.locations.id.eq=MKTPLACE&filter.locations.fulfillment.eq=SHIP"
	req, _ := http.NewRequest("GET", url, nil)
	req.Header.Add("Content-Type", "application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
	req.Header.Add("Authorization", "Bearer {{TOKEN}}")
	res, _ := http.DefaultClient.Do(req)
	defer res.Body.Close()
	body, _ := ioutil.ReadAll(res.Body)
	fmt.Println(res)
	fmt.Println(string(body))
}

get.description: Search a location's product catalog for inventory-specific details. Current stock levels, fulfillment status, and active promotions are included.

parameters.name: filter.upc.in
parameters.description:
Exact match to product identifier, typically UPC, or GTIN.

Duplicate UPCs if present in the request parameter are ignored.

Max allowed non-duplicate UPCs per request: 50

parameters.name: filter.locations.id.eq
parameters.description:
Exact match to the 8-character locationId for the store or distribution center.

(filter.storeId.eq in the original Catalog Search endpoint.)

parameters.name: filter.locations.fulfillment.eq
parameters.description:
Exact match to product fulfillment option.

Must be one of: DELIVERY, SHIP, PICKUP, or INSTORE. (filter.modality.eq in the original Catalog Search endpoint.)

parameters.name: filter.stockLevelUpdatedAt.range
parameters.description: The last stock level updated date range provided as a comma separated set with the start date and end date in that order. Products with stock levels updated within this range (inclusive) will be returned.

parameters.name: filter.fulfillmentUpdatedAt.range
parameters.description: The last fulfillment updated date range provided as a comma separated set with the start date and end date in that order. Products with fulfillment updated within this range (inclusive) will be returned.

parameters.name: filter.updatedAt.range
parameters.description: The updated date range provided as a comma separated set with the start date and end date in that order. Products updated within this range (inclusive) will be returned.

parameters.name: filter.postalCode.eq
parameters.description:
Exact match to postal code or ZIP code. (When filter.modality is set to DELIVERY for Ocado stores.)

**This is a required field to request Ocado DELIVERY store products.**

**Note:** For US addresses, one can use either the 5-digit or 9-digit ZIP+4.

parameters.name: option.missingPrices
parameters.description:
Controls whether items without pricing information are included in the response.

- If omitted or set to `false`, only items with pricing information available will be returned.
- If set to `true`, all items will be included. Items without pricing details will still appear, with their `prices` field set to `null`.

**Note:** Use this parameter when you want to include UPCs that don't have any associated pricing data.

x-code-samples.source:
package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"io/ioutil"
	"net/http"
)

func main() {
	url := "https://api.kroger.com/catalog/v2/products-inventory?filter.locations.id.eq=MKTPLACE&filter.locations.fulfillment.eq=SHIP"
	req, _ := http.NewRequest("GET", url, nil)
	req.Header.Add("Content-Type", "application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
	req.Header.Add("Authorization", "Bearer {{TOKEN}}")
	res, _ := http.DefaultClient.Do(req)
	defer res.Body.Close()
	body, _ := ioutil.ReadAll(res.Body)
	fmt.Println(res)
	fmt.Println(string(body))
}

get.description: Returns the disabled items based upon specified criteria.

parameters.name: filter.locations.id.eq
parameters.description:
Exact match to the 8-character locationId for the store or distribution center.

(filter.storeId.eq in the original Catalog Search endpoint.)

parameters.name: filter.locations.fulfillment.eq
parameters.description:
Exact match to product fulfillment option.

Must be one of: DELIVERY, SHIP, PICKUP, or INSTORE.

(filter.modality.eq in the original Catalog Search endpoint.)

parameters.name: filter.deletedAt.range
parameters.description:
The deleted date range provided as a comma separated set with the start date and end date in that order. 

Products disabled within this range (inclusive) will be returned.

Note: The maximum supported range for this parameter is 2 days.

x-code-samples.source:
package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"io/ioutil"
	"net/http"
)

func main() {
	url := "https://api.kroger.com/catalog/v2/deleted-items?filter.locations.id.eq=MKTPLACE&filter.locations.fulfillment.eq=SHIP"
	req, _ := http.NewRequest("GET", url, nil)
	req.Header.Add("Content-Type", "application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
	req.Header.Add("Authorization", "Bearer {{TOKEN}}")
	res, _ := http.DefaultClient.Do(req)
	defer res.Body.Close()
	body, _ := ioutil.ReadAll(res.Body)
	fmt.Println(res)
	fmt.Println(string(body))
}

catalog_v2_page.size.name: page.size
catalog_v2_page.size.description:
Number of products obtained per page.

Allowed range: [1 - 50]

aliasUPCs.description: An array of alternate UPCs or GTINs associated with the product.

name.example: Simple Truth™ Paso Robles Cabernet Sauvignon

description.example: Our organic Cabernet Sauvignon grapes are grown on one of California's largest organic vineyards, in the hills of Paso Robles on the Central Coast. With its wide day-to-night temperature swings and fossil-rich marine limestones, this growing region provides unique stressors that produce deep, intense flavors with structure and elegance.

receiptDescription.description: A brief description of the item as displayed on the receipt.

name.example: Simple Truth™ Paso Robles Cabernet Sauvignon

updatedAt.description: Product stock or stocklevel or fulfillment last updated timestamp.

prices.description: List of prices available for this postal code

nFor.description: Number of items for the given price
Number of items for the given price

effectiveDate.description: Start date and time when the promo price is effective.

expiredDate.description: Date and time when the promo price expires.

id.description: Unique identifier for Kroger store or distribution center location.

snapEligible.description: Indicates if an item is eligible for Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) or not.

alcoholic.description: Indicates if an item is alcoholic

alcoholProof.description: Identifies the alcohol proof of the product.

restrictedItem.description: Indicates if an item has any restriction or not

ageRestrictionFlag.description: Indicates if an item has age restriction

averageWeightPerUnit.description: Average weight per unit of the product ( This field is calculated when the Order by is unit and the Sell by is weight ).

heatSensitive.description: Indicates if an item is heat sensitive or not

catalog_v2.products.metadata.package.description: Package details like dimensions and weight.

instock.description: Indicates if a product is instock at a store location or not.

level.description: Level of stock of particular product.

price.description: Product price if given quantity is bought.

catalog_v2.products.locations.aisleLocat.description: Product aisleLocations in a given store location.

departmentCode.description: A 2-character string representing the department where the item is located.

departmentDescription.description: A long-form string providing the full name of the department where the item is located.

areaId.description: A 3-character numeric ID representing the area where the item is placed.

areaTypeCode.description: A 2-character code that defines the type of area where the item is stored or displayed.

areaTypeDescription.description: A long-form description of the area type.

subAreaId.description: A 2 or 3 character numeric ID representing the sub-area within an aisle or section.

subAreaTypeCode.description: A 2-character code representing a subsection within the main area.

subAreaTypeDescription.description: A long-form description of the sub-area where the product is stored or displayed.

orientationCode.description: A code representing the side or orientation of the fixture where the item is placed

orientationDescription.description: A human-readable description of the product’s orientation within the fixture.

fixtureNumber.description: A numeric string representing the identifier of the fixture (e.g., a shelf) within the bay where the item is located. It resembles the legacy shelfNumber field and helps pinpoint the exact placement of the product.

fixLocAbbreviated.description: An abbreviated code used to represent the fixture location concisely.

locationType.description: The type of location where the product is stored/displayed.

effectiveDate.description: Product price type effective date. If there's a promo price, the effective date is associated with it; otherwise, it's associated with the regular price.

expiredDate.description: Product price type expired date. If there's a promo price, the expiry date is associated with it; otherwise, it's associated with the regular price.

hasMore.description: An optional flag to indicate if there are more products available beyond the current page to retrieve.

reason.example: Sorry, an unexpected error has occurred. Please try again later.

Client-Context.description: To make an API request that interacts with generalized information and does not require customer consent, use the [Client Credentials Grant Type](https://developer.kroger.com/reference/api/authorization-endpoints-partner#tag/OAuth2/operation/accessToken) to authenticate your OAuth2 application.
